intro.title: Attachment style (ECR-S)
intro.description: We'll look together at your pattern in close relationships across two axes: anxiety and avoidance. Then we'll see which of four styles you lean toward. Think of close relationships in general, not one specific person. Split across 3 pages, 5 items each (last page has 2).
intro.citation: Wei, Russell, Mallinckrodt, & Vogel (2007) · validated short form

survey.instruction: Think of close relationships in general. Rate 1 (strongly disagree) to 7 (strongly agree).

saveError: We couldn't save your results. Your answers are still here.

exit.title: Exit survey?
exit.body: Are you sure you want to exit? Your progress will not be saved.
